name: Dr. Anika Rahman
bio: PhD from BUET, 12 years of teaching experience in algorithms and data structures. Passionate about problem-solving.

name: Prof. Tariq Hassan
bio: Specializes in complex data structures and algorithmic efficiency optimization. Has authored multiple textbooks.

name: Dr. Fahmida Chowdhury
bio: Expert in machine learning and neural networks. Heads the new AI Lab facility at OmniVault.

name: Dr. Jamal Islam
bio: Over a decade of corporate management experience before joining academia. Focuses on organizational behavior.

name: Prof. Naima Haque
bio: Certified CPA with extensive research in forensic accounting and international financial regulations.

name: Dr. Kamal Uddin
bio: Researcher in digital marketing dynamics and consumer behavior analytics in emerging markets.

name: Ms. Sadia Hossain
bio: Professional graphic designer with a focus on typography and minimalist editorial layouts.

name: Mr. Asif Ahmed
bio: Specializes in UX methodologies and interactive prototyping. Acts as an industry consultant for local startups.

name: Ms. Nusrat Jahan
bio: Expert in 3D modeling and animation pipelines. Former character rigger for an international animation studio.

name: Dr. Rashedul Islam
bio: Renowned physicist dedicated to alternative energy research and practical thermodynamics.

name: Dr. Salma Begum
bio: Leading researcher in organic synthesis and molecular structure analysis.

name: Dr. Hasan Mahmud
bio: Focused on recombinant DNA and genetic regulation mechanisms. Actively involved in biotechnology research.
